description.content: Returns a paginated list of active job postings published by a company. Supports filtering by keyword, location, department, and custom fields.

query.description: Full-text search query across job title and description

Number of results to skip for pagination
Filter by region or state name
Filter postings by language code (e.g., en, fr, de)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The SmartRecruiters Posting API enables customers to build fully customizable career sites by providing access to published job postings. Supports searching and filtering postings by keyword, location, department, language, and custom fields.

Contact Support:
